nasb.text: And lo, from the Nile there came up seven cows, sleek and fat; and they grazed in the marsh grass.

esv.text: and behold, there came up out of the Nile seven cows, attractive and plump, and they fed in the reed grass.

cnv.text: 有七頭母牛從河裡上來，又健美又肥壯，在蘆葦中吃草。

ccb.text: 有七头肥美、健壮的母牛从河里上来，在芦苇丛中吃草。

csbs.text: 看哪！有七头健美肥壮的母牛从尼罗河里上来，在芦苇中吃草。
